description: Obsidian app-management — service overview. Backwards-compatible queries: prefer the new app_http_requests_total / app_dependency_calls_total counters when present, fall back to histogram _count series for historical ranges.
title: Obsidian — App Management (Service Overview)

options.content:
**Metric retention:** Grafana Cloud Prometheus stores metrics for **13 months** (free tier). Metrics ARE persistent — no extra config needed.

**Why some panels show ‘No data’ for old time ranges:** the dedicated counters `app_http_requests_total` and `app_dependency_calls_total` are recent additions. They have no history before the service was last restarted. For backwards compatibility, every panel below also queries the **existing histogram `_count` series** (which has full 13-month history) via PromQL `or` — so panels populate for old ranges using the histogram path.

**Counter cumulative resets:** OTel counters are cumulative. On app restart they reset to 0. `rate()` and `increase()` handle this correctly via Prometheus stale markers — no action needed.

**OTel export interval:** 60s. First data point on a new metric appears ~60s after first request post-restart.

panels.title: Service
panels.description: UP if any traffic-emitting metric arrived in the last 2 minutes.

targets.expr: (max(present_over_time(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env"}[2m])) or on() max(present_over_time(target_info{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env"}[2m]))) or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Server Uptime % (range)
panels.description: Percent of 1-min buckets in range with telemetry observed.

panels.title: Error Rate (5xx)
panels.description: 5xx ÷ total. Tries new counter first, falls back to histogram count for historical ranges.

targets.expr: 100 * sum(rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_status_code=~"5..", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[5m])), 1e-9)

100 * sum(rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_status_code=~"4..", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[5m])), 1e-9)

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[5m])))

panels.title: 📡  Dependency Pulse  ·  Gemini · Supabase · Cache Redis · Redis Queue · Object Storage · Pinecone · Temporal · Temporal DB
Requests/s by Status Class
panels.description: Stacked rate by HTTP status class (1xx/2xx/3xx/4xx/5xx). Source: histogram count series filtered by http_status_code regex.

targets.expr: sum(rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_status_code=~"2..", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[1m])) or on() vector(0)

sum(rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_status_code=~"3..", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[1m])) or on() vector(0)

sum(rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_status_code=~"4..", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[1m])) or on() vector(0)

sum(rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_status_code=~"5..", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[1m])) or on() vector(0)

histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by (le) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[5m])))

100 * sum(rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_status_code=~"5..", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[5m])), 1e-9)

100 * sum(rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_status_code=~"4..", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method", http_route=~"$route"}[5m])), 1e-9)

panels.title: Avg Latency per Route (ms, top 25)
panels.description: rate(_sum)/clamp_min(rate(_count)). topk picks highest avg over routes with traffic.

targets.expr: topk(25, sum by (http_route) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_sum{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (http_route) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method"}[5m])), 1e-9))

topk(25, sum by (http_route) (rate(app_http_server_request_cpu_milliseconds_sum{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (http_route) (rate(app_http_server_request_cpu_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method"}[5m])), 1e-9))

topk(20, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, http_route) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method"}[5m]))))

topk(20, sum by (http_route) (increase(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_status_code=~"5..", http_method=~"$method"}[$__range])))

topk(20, sum by (http_route) (increase(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_status_code=~"4..", http_method=~"$method"}[$__range])))

sum by (http_route) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_sum{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (http_route) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method"}[5m])), 1e-9)
histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, http_route) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, http_route) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, http_route) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method"}[5m])))

sum by (http_route) (rate(app_http_server_request_cpu_milliseconds_sum{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (http_route) (rate(app_http_server_request_cpu_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method"}[5m])), 1e-9)

100 * sum by (http_route) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_status_code=~"4..", http_method=~"$method"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (http_route) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method"}[5m])), 1e-9)

100 * sum by (http_route) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_status_code=~"5..", http_method=~"$method"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (http_route) (rate(app_http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_method=~"$method"}[5m])), 1e-9)

panels.title: Dependency Call Volume
panels.description: Share of dependency calls by target — uses histogram count series so historical ranges populate.

targets.expr: sum by (dep_target) (rate(app_dependency_duration_milliseconds_sum{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (dep_target) (rate(app_dependency_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env"}[5m])), 1e-9)

panels.title: 🔴 Dependency Error Rate (range)
panels.description: errors ÷ total calls. Source: histogram count filtered by error label != "".

targets.expr: 100 * sum by (dep_target) (increase(app_dependency_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", error!=""}[$__range])) / clamp_min(sum by (dep_target) (increase(app_dependency_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env"}[$__range])), 1e-9)
topk(15, sum by (dep_target, dep_operation) (increase(app_dependency_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", error!=""}[$__range])))

panels.title: 🔎  Logs  ·  filter via Trace ID / Hashed User UUID

targets.expr: {service_name=~"$service"} | json | (deployment_environment=~"$env" or deployment_environment="") | (trace_id=~".*$trace_id.*" or trace_id="") | (hashed_user_uuid=~".*$hashed_user_uuid.*" or hashed_user_uuid="") | (route=~"$route" or route="") | line_format "[{{.level | upper}}] {{.event}} {{if .method}}| {{.method}} {{.route}} {{end}}{{if .status_code}}| {{.status_code}} {{end}}{{if .duration_ms}}| {{printf \"%.0f\" .duration_ms}}ms {{end}}{{if .hashed_user_uuid}}| user:{{.hashed_user_uuid}} {{end}}{{if .trace_id}}| trace:{{.trace_id}} {{end}}{{if .error_message}}| err:{{.error_message}}{{end}}"

{service_name=~"$service"} | json | level=~"(?i)warning|error|critical" | (deployment_environment=~"$env" or deployment_environment="") | (trace_id=~".*$trace_id.*" or trace_id="") | (hashed_user_uuid=~".*$hashed_user_uuid.*" or hashed_user_uuid="") | line_format "[{{.level | upper}}] {{.event}} | {{if .method}}{{.method}} {{end}}{{if .route}}{{.route}} | {{end}}{{if .status_code}}{{.status_code}} | {{end}}{{if .exception_type}}{{.exception_type}}: {{end}}{{if .exception_message}}{{.exception_message}}{{else}}{{.error_message}}{{end}} {{if .trace_id}}| trace:{{.trace_id}}{{end}}"

{service_name=~"$service"} | json | event="request_finished" | duration_ms > 1000 | (deployment_environment=~"$env" or deployment_environment="") | line_format "{{printf \"%.0f\" .duration_ms}}ms | {{.method}} {{.route}} | {{.status_code}} | cpu {{printf \"%.0f\" .cpu_ms}}ms | user:{{.hashed_user_uuid}} | trace:{{.trace_id}}"

panels.title: Trace Lookup (by Trace ID variable)
panels.description: Set the Trace ID variable to fetch a single trace.
